attempts.objective: Load flag.txt and brute-force all 26 Caesar shifts to look for the flag.
attempts.command: for i in {0..25}; do cat flag.txt | tr 'A-Za-z' "$(echo {a..z} | fold -w1 | sed -n $((i+1))p)" > shift_$i.txt; done
